title: Loaded Baked Potatoes
description: A comforting and customizable meal, perfect for a family dinner. These baked potatoes are loaded with delicious toppings that even the pickiest eaters will love.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Pierce each potato several times with a fork.
Rub potatoes with olive oil and sprinkle with salt. Place directly on the oven rack.
Bake for 50-60 minutes, or until tender when squeezed.
Carefully remove potatoes from the oven. Slice each potato lengthwise down the middle, being careful not to cut all the way through.
Fluff the inside of each potato with a fork. Add butter, milk, and black pepper. Mix gently until creamy.
Stir in half of the shredded cheddar cheese, crumbled bacon, and chopped green onions.
Top each potato with a dollop of sour cream, the remaining cheddar cheese, and a sprinkle of green onions and bacon.
tips: For extra crispy skin, rub potatoes with a little extra olive oil before baking.
Leftover loaded baked potatoes can be stored in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
Customize toppings with your family's favorites, such as steamed broccoli, chili, or pulled pork.
